document_metadata.first_words: ### ਆਓ ਕੁੱਝ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਅਤੇ ਵਾਕ ਸਿੱਖੀਏ ਜੋ ਮੌਸਮ ਬਾਰੇ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਮੱਦਦ ਕਰਨ। ## ਵੀਡੀਓ ਇਸ ਫਿਲਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਫਿਲਿਮ, ਨਾਜ਼ੀਆ ਅਤੇ ਜੈਸ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ ਕਿ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਮੌਸਮ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਹਫਤੇ ਦੇ ਅੰਤ ਦੀਆਂ ਯੋਜਨਾਵਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਵਿਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ। ## ਮੁੱਖ ਸ਼ਬਦ 1 of 7 Sorry, something went wrongCheck your connection, refresh the page and try again. This video can not be played

### Video TranscriptVideo Transcript

**Nazia:** My family and I are going away this weekend.

**Jess:** Great! Where are you you going?

**Nazia:** I’m not sure… Where should we go?

**Filip:** The beach! We are going to the beach.

**Jess:** I think it's going to rain this weekend.

**Filip:** If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.

**Nazia:** I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!

**Jess:** I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!

**Nazia:** That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?

**Jess:** You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.

**Filip:** Is Edinburgh cold?

**Jess:** It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.

**Filip:** We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.

**Nazia:** Where are you going this weekend, Jess?

**Jess:** My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them. My mum will drive us there in our car.

**Filip:** Maybe you will see the monster!

**Nazia:** The Loch Ness Monster?

**Jess:** I think I saw it once… Or maybe it was a log.

**Filip:** I would love to see a monster!

**Jess:** Oh, it’s time to go home! Have a nice weekend!

**Nazia:** Thanks, you too. See you on Monday!

**Filip:** If it’s sunny, and I go to the beach, maybe I will see the monster!

Back to top

### ਬਰਸਾਤ ਲਈ ਸ਼ਬਦ

ਸਕਾਟਲੈਂਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਬਹੁਤ ਮੀਂਹ ਪੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ!

ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਡਿਵਾਇਸ ਵਰਤਦਿਆਂ, ਸਕਾਟਿਸ਼ ਸ਼ਬਦਾਂ ਬਾਰੇ ਖੋਜੋ ਜੋ ਮੀਂਹ ਬਾਰੇ ਦੱਸਣ। ਤੁਸੀਂ ਕਿੰਨੇ ਲੱਭ ਸਕਦੇ ਹੋ?

### Video TranscriptVideo Transcript

**Nazia:** My family and I are going away this weekend.

**Jess:** Great! Where are you you going?

**Nazia:** I’m not sure… Where should we go?

**Filip:** The beach! We are going to the beach.

**Jess:** I think it's going to rain this weekend.

**Filip:** If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.

**Nazia:** I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!

**Jess:** I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!

**Nazia:** That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?

**Jess:** You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.

**Filip:** Is Edinburgh cold?

**Jess:** It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.

**Filip:** We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.

**Nazia:** Where are you going this weekend, Jess?

**Jess:** My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them. My mum will drive us there in our car.

**Filip:** Maybe you will see the monster!

**Nazia:** The Loch Ness Monster?

**Jess:** I think I saw it once… Or maybe it was a log.

**Filip:** I would love to see a monster!

**Jess:** Oh, it’s time to go home! Have a nice weekend!

**Nazia:** Thanks, you too. See you on Monday!

**Filip:** If it’s sunny, and I go to the beach, maybe I will see the monster!

Place“,“holdingImage“:“https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/$recipe/p0ddskxw.png“,“vpid“:“p0c7c245“,“transcript“:“3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> My family and I are going away this weekend.3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> Great! Where are you you going?3/p>3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> I’m not sure… Where should we go?3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> The beach! We are going to the beach.3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> I think it's going to rain this weekend.3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.3/p>3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!3/p>3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> Is Edinburgh cold?3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.3/p>3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> Where are you going this weekend, Jess?3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them. My mum will drive us there in our car.3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> Maybe you will see the monster!3/p>3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> The Loch Ness Monster?3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> I think I saw it once… Or maybe it was a log.3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> I would love to see a monster!3/p>3p>3strong>Jess:3/strong> Oh, it’s time to go home! Have a nice weekend!3/p>3p>3strong>Nazia:3/strong> Thanks, you too. See you on Monday!3/p>3p>3strong>Filip:3/strong> If it’s sunny, and I go to the beach, maybe I will see the weekend.</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> Great! Where are you you going?</p><p><strong>Nazia:</strong> I’m not sure… Where should we go?</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> The beach! We are going to the beach.</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> I think it's going to rain this weekend.</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.</p><p><strong>Nazia:</strong> I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!</p><p><strong>Nazia:</strong> That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> Is Edinburgh cold?</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.</p><p><strong>Nazia:</strong> Where are you going this weekend, Jess?</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them. My mum will drive us there in our car.</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> Maybe you will see the monster!</p><p><strong>Nazia:</strong> The Loch Ness Monster?</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> I think I saw it once… Or maybe it was a log.</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> I would love to see a monster!</p><p><strong>Jess:</strong> Oh, it’s time to go home! Have a nice weekend!</p><p><strong>Nazia:</strong> Thanks, you too. See you on Monday!</p><p><strong>Filip:</strong> If it’s sunny, and I go to the beach, maybe I will see the monster!</p></div></div></section></div></div></div></figure></div></div><div Place\",\"holdingImage\":\"https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/$recipe/p0ddskxw.png\",\"vpid\":\"p0c7c245\",\"transcript\":\"\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> My family and I are going away this weekend.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> Great! Where are you you going?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> I’m not sure… Where should we go?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> The beach! We are going to the beach.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> I think it's going to rain this weekend.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> Is Edinburgh cold?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> Where are you going this weekend, Jess?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them. My mum will drive us there in our car.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> Maybe you will see the monster!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> The Loch Ness Monster?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> I think I saw it once… Or maybe it was a log.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> I would love to see a monster!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> Oh, it’s time to go home! Have a nice weekend!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> Thanks, you too. See you on Monday!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> If it’s sunny, and I go to the beach, maybe I will see the ### ਆਓ ਕੁੱਝ ਸ਼ਬਦ ਅਤੇ ਵਾਕ ਸਿੱਖੀਏ ਜੋ ਮੌਸਮ ਬਾਰੇ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਨ ਵਿੱਚ ਮੱਦਦ ਕਰਨ।

[Back to top](#main-content)

## ਵੀਡੀਓ

ਇਸ ਫਿਲਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਫਿਲਿਮ, ਨਾਜ਼ੀਆ ਅਤੇ ਜੈਸ ਗੱਲ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਨ ਕਿ ਕਿਵੇਂ ਮੌਸਮ ਉਹਨਾਂ ਦੇ ਹਫਤੇ ਦੇ ਅੰਤ ਦੀਆਂ ਯੋਜਨਾਵਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਭਾਵਿਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ।

### Video TranscriptVideo Transcript

**Nazia:** My family and I are going away this weekend.

**Jess:** Great! Where are you you going?

**Nazia:** I’m not sure… Where should we go?

**Filip:** The beach! We are going to the beach.

**Jess:** I think it's going to rain this weekend.

**Filip:** If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.

**Nazia:** I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!

**Jess:** I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!

**Nazia:** That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?

**Jess:** You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.

**Filip:** Is Edinburgh cold?

**Jess:** It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.

**Filip:** We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.

**Nazia:** Where are you going this weekend, Jess?

**Jess:** My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them. My mum will drive us there in our car.

**Filip:** Maybe you will see the monster!

**Nazia:** The Loch Ness Monster?

**Jess:** I think I saw it once… Or maybe it was a log.

**Filip:** I would love to see a monster!

**Jess:** Oh, it’s time to go home! Have a nice weekend!

**Nazia:** Thanks, you too. See you on Monday!

**Filip:** If it’s sunny, and I go to the beach, maybe I will see the monster!

It *will be*…closeSorry, something went wrongCheck your connection, refresh the page and try again.

(ਸੁਝਾਅ: ਤੁਸੀਂ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਸ਼ਨ ਬਣਾਉਣ ਲਈ ਸ਼ਬਦਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਬਦਲ ਵੀ ਸਕਦੇ ਹੋ:  Will it be… ?closeSorry, something went wrongCheck your connection, refresh the page and try again.)

\_

ਉਦਾਹਰਨਾਂ:

It will be *hot* and *rainy*.closeSorry, something went wrongCheck your connection, refresh the page and try again.

## 

![Challenge](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/images/ic/480xn/p099cq33.png)

### ਬਰਸਾਤ ਲਈ ਸ਼ਬਦ

ਸਕਾਟਲੈਂਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਬਹੁਤ ਮੀਂਹ ਪੈਂਦਾ ਹੈ!

ਕੋਈ ਵੀ ਡਿਵਾਇਸ ਵਰਤਦਿਆਂ, ਸਕਾਟਿਸ਼ ਸ਼ਬਦਾਂ ਬਾਰੇ ਖੋਜੋ ਜੋ ਮੀਂਹ ਬਾਰੇ ਦੱਸਣ। ਤੁਸੀਂ ਕਿੰਨੇ ਲੱਭ ਸਕਦੇ ਹੋ?

Where are you you going?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> I’m not sure… Where should we go?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> The beach! We are going to the beach.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> I think it's going to rain this weekend.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> If it rains we will go to a mu…museum.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> I went to a museum last week. It was interesting!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> I went to Edinburgh Castle and I really liked it. You should go!\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> That’s a great idea - we will go to the castle! How do we get there?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> You can take the train to Edinburgh and then walk through the Old Town to see it.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> Is Edinburgh cold?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> It’s not really cold, but it’s very windy and sometimes wet.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Filip:\\u003c/strong> We have castles in Poland too! But Poland is very cold in winter and very warm in summer.\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Nazia:\\u003c/strong> Where are you going this weekend, Jess?\\u003c/p>\\u003cp>\\u003cstrong>Jess:\\u003c/strong> My grandparents live in Inverness, so I’m going to visit them.
